secciones.titulo: A local plumbing & electrical company you can trust to help protect and enhance your most valuable asset: your home.

secciones.titulo: After Hours Plumbing, Inc. is a full-service plumbing company for residential & commercial customers. Now offering electrical service for residential customers!
secciones.contenido: What's in a name? After Hours Plumbing, Inc. offers more than just after hours plumbing service. In fact, the majority of the work we perform happens between 8:30 AM and 4:00 PM Monday through Friday. For all the plumbing emergencies that can occur, we have an on-call plumbing technician to help when you need it most.

Residential Plumbing & Electrical: We understand that your home is one of your most valuable assets. Our primary objective is to help you protect and enhance that investment. We work closely with homeowners to solve problems creatively, quickly and with longevity in mind.

Commercial Plumbing: Keeping your business running smoothly and protecting your commercial property is at the forefront of our commercial work. Our team has the skill to get you back in business quickly while providing long-term solutions to mitigate future plumbing issues.

secciones.titulo: Check Out Our Recent Work & Reviews
Our qualified plumbers are ready to help with your project! Our plumbing services include:
secciones.contenido:
Drain Cleaning
Water Leak Repair
Sewer Line Repair
Emergency Service
Kitchen & Bathroom Remodels
Water Heater Installation
Whole-House Repiping
Water Service Replacement
Sewer Mainline Replacement

Our plumbing & electrical technicians are highly trained, licensed, and ready to handle any plumbing challenge you may have. Our primary objective is to help our customers protect and enhance their real estate investments. From our office team to our plumbing & electrical technicians, we're here to help you navigate any plumbing or electrical challenges that may arise.

imagenes.descripcion: Foto del equipo de After Hours Plumbing

secciones.contenido: "After Hours Plumbing did a great job with all of my plumbing needs. I was scheduled to have some hose bibs changed out but remembered a couple other projects that I needed help with when the crew showed up. They were able to fix all of my issues. The crew was friendly, knowledgable and timely. They presented me with options and let me choose what I thought was best and even better, they didn't try to upsell me on anything. Give them a call for your plumbing needs!" — Cy Grimmett, WA
